title: Senior Financial Analyst - IDFC First Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - IDFC First Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IDFC First Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IDFC First Bank:
IDFC First Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDFC First Bank!
